EmailTemplate.description: Follow up email to Professional Indemnity claim.
EmailTemplate.name: FNOL to Insured – Professional Indemnity
EmailTemplate.subject: Information required to support claims process
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
(Use for those who notified us) Thank you for your time today and for notifying us that you would like to make a potential Professional Indemnity claim.
(Use for those where we received notification) We have received notification of a potential claim being made against you for (insert allegations and claimant here).
So that we can present a claim to our insurers, please may you kindly forward the following:
- Overview of events to date giving as much detail as possible - The dates of when the incident occurred - When the intimated potential claim was made against you if this is the case - An idea if you can of a possible reserve against the claim – attaching figures if any figures have been disclosed - Claimant’s name, address, and contact details - Statement from the Client or as much detail as you can with attachments - Copies of prior correspondence, email or any other correspondence received - Confirmation of contractor(s) and full name(s) if applicable - Explain if you know, their view of responsibility - As much information on the records / paperwork that you have kept as support - Confirmation of your VAT status
I attached a copy of your policy schedule and wording to assist.
Once I have received all your information, I can present the details to our insurers. Depending on how quickly you are able to return the information back to me will determine the timeframe for this.
Once this has been passed to insurers, the insurers may be in contact directly with you. However we are here to support at any time.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Claims Team
E: claims@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
